message:
Extract daemon client implementation to frankensearch crate

Replace the entire ~1200-line daemon client implementation with thin
re-exports from the frankensearch crate. Previously this module contained:

- DaemonRetryConfig struct with retry/backoff configuration
- DaemonClient trait definition
- DaemonError enum with all error variants
- NoopDaemonClient implementation for testing
- DaemonFallbackEmbedder with retry + jittered backoff logic
- DaemonFallbackReranker with retry + jittered backoff logic
- All associated unit tests

All of this has been migrated to frankensearch-core and frankensearch-fusion
crates. The module now re-exports: DaemonClient, DaemonError,
DaemonFallbackEmbedder, DaemonFallbackReranker, DaemonRetryConfig, and
NoopDaemonClient from the frankensearch crate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
